chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1522 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- AAG files statement of District Education Officer (Elementary, Secondary and Higher Secondary) Noushero Feroze along with certain documents, same is taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition. Under instruction, the instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
